title: Marvel & DC's War on God: The Antichrist Agenda
original_title: Marvel & DC's War on God: The Antichrist Agenda
overview: Marvel and DC's War on God: The Antichrist Agenda is part 1 in a series exposing how popular comics, movies, and TV shows are riddled with anti-Christ themes glorifying violence, sexual perversion, blasphemy, and the occult.
